injuries.comment: The Hurricanes said that Carrier will be back in Saturday's (Dec. 27) game versus the Red Wings.
The Hurricanes said that Miller is a game-time decision for Saturday's (Dec. 27) match versus the Red Wings.
The Hurricanes said that Martinook will be back in Saturday's (Dec. 27) game versus the Red Wings.

Nikishin was seen icing his right ankle in the locker room following Tuesday's (Dec. 23) game versus the Panthers, and head coach Rod Brind'Amour didn't have an update on the defenseman's status, per Cory Lavalette of The North State Journal.
Kane did not play on Tuesday's (Dec. 23) game against the Stars, per Helene St. James of the Detroit Free Press.
